channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped car bumper, 23rd June
item.description:
Dumped car bumper beside parking for Kings Hall Road tennis courts.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: More rubbish, 23rd June
item.description:
As soon as the other was cleaned up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paston Crescent, Eltham

item.title: Graffiti, 23rd June
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 20/06/26 Graffiti - Non offensive Lat/Long - 51.4154813, -0.0240397 what3words - hardly.comb.shark Nearest address - 1 Albemarle Court, Southend Road, Beckenham, BR3 5AH Southend Road opposite no 30. Please remove graffiti from cable box Reference - 5658736 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Open 20/06/2026 15:40 Southend Road opposite no 30. Please remove graffiti from cable box
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover fault after thames water Works on Southwood Lane, 23rd June
item.description:
Thames water Doug up Southwood Lane recently and unfortunately did not replace the manhole covers correctly at the junction of Southwood Lane and the park, N6. The manhole cover makes a terrible noise every time a car or a person crosses over it 20:47 hours a day seven days a week. Please can somebody come and reset the manhole cover I have taken a photo and it makes a noise, even if you walk on it let alone drive over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwood Lane, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa fly tipped on Andre street, 23rd June
item.description:
Sofa has been left on the street for a few weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Andre Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Please remove graffiti from litter bin Reference - 5658732 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Open 20/06/2026 15:37 Outside Parker House. Please remove graffiti from litter bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brackley Road, New Beckenham, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rhyl Street, Chalk Farm, Greater London

item.title: Car dumped Elibank Road, 23rd June
item.description:
This has been here for months & I've reported it before but it's got fllat tires and a buildup of debris from the recent weeks in all weathers.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grangehill Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation on path., 23rd June
item.description:
Nettles and brambles on the path. So narrow now. I was stung by the nettles and caught on the brambles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookmead Close, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electricals now, 23rd June
item.description:
This is constantly happening and now it's electricals

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longville Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green requires ground repairs and grass cut, 23rd June
item.description:
The original tree in the middle of the green died and was replaced Despite reassurance by the Council the area where the tree grew has not been cultivated properly There is a huge hole, part of the stump and roots are still there and the grass is dying Can we have the green brought back to its original state where the children can play and the weeds around it taken out The other tree also needs some pruning as it now overhangs the road The maintenance over the last two years has deteriorated for this area. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merewood Close, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gully blocked, 23rd June
item.description:
Between junction of Benares and Churchmanorway

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benares Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Vale of Health, Belsize Park, Greater London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Longmeadow Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 23rd June
item.description:
Lots of rubbish outside 23 Wingmore Rd, a torn bin bag from someone's bin with all kinds of food and dirty wrappings on pavement and road. Please could you get it cleared up?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Wingmore Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain covers in Durham Road, 23rd June
item.description:
Drains outside 55 and 53 Durham Road are blocked with leaves and debris. When it rains, this causes flooding and increases the amount of debris. The road sweeper carts attend Durham Road on Sunday mornings which is an ineffective time as residents have their cars parked on the street. They would be more effective on a weekday morning. Current situation needs to be resolved.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88, Durham Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to comminal bins, South East corner of Gorefield House, 23rd June
item.description:
Vareity of household waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)
